languages.text: "Да нет же, Нунциус, напротив, утверждает, что подобные феномены часто возникают, если ток Движущей Силы внутри гальванически-активных контуров... Погодите, вы ведь совсем его не слушаете, да?" {n}В голосе Эоганна появляется отчетливый оттенок укоризны.{/n}

"No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да нет же, Нунциус, напротив, утверждает, что подобные феномены часто возникают, если ток Движущей Силы внутри гальванически-активных контуров... Погодите, вы ведь совсем его не слушаете, да?" {n}В голосе Эоганна появляется отчетливый оттенок укоризны.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

"No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

"No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

languages.text: «No, más bien al contrario; Nuncius asevera que tales fenómenos suelen ocurrir si la corriente de la Fuerza Motriz que fluye por circuitos galvánicos activos se... Un momento, en realidad no lo está oyendo, ¿verdad?». {n}La voz de Eogunn tiene un apreciable tono de reproche.{/n}
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No, más bien al contrario; Nuncius asevera que tales fenómenos suelen ocurrir si la corriente de la Fuerza Motriz que fluye por circuitos galvánicos activos se... Un momento, en realidad no lo está oyendo, ¿verdad?». {n}La voz de Eogunn tiene un apreciable tono de reproche.{/n}

languages.text: “不，恰恰相反，努恩修斯断言说，这类现象通常发生于当电激活性回路中的源力电流……等等，您根本就没在听他说话，对吧？”{n}伊奥贡的声音里带着一丝明显的责备。{/n}
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “不，恰恰相反，努恩修斯断言说，这类现象通常发生于当电激活性回路中的源力电流……等等，您根本就没在听他说话，对吧？”{n}伊奥贡的声音里带着一丝明显的责备。{/n}

languages.text: « Non, Nuncius, au contraire, les affirmations selon lesquelles un tel phénomène survient souvent si le courant de la Force Motrice dans les circuits à galvanisation active... Attendez, vous ne l'écoutez absolument pas, si ? » {n}Vous décelez un ton de reproche dans la voix d'Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Non, Nuncius, au contraire, les affirmations selon lesquelles un tel phénomène survient souvent si le courant de la Force Motrice dans les circuits à galvanisation active... Attendez, vous ne l'écoutez absolument pas, si ? » {n}Vous décelez un ton de reproche dans la voix d'Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: "Hayır. Tam aksine Nuncius'nun dediği, bu tür olayların galvaniz olarak aktif devrelerin içindeki Devinim Gücü akımı'nın... Bir dakika. Dinlemiyorsunuz, değil mi?" {n}Eogunn'un sesi, belirgin bir sitem tonu taşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hayır. Tam aksine Nuncius'nun dediği, bu tür olayların galvaniz olarak aktif devrelerin içindeki Devinim Gücü akımı'nın... Bir dakika. Dinlemiyorsunuz, değil mi?" {n}Eogunn'un sesi, belirgin bir sitem tonu taşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「いいえ、ヌンキウスはむしろ逆だと主張しています。ガルヴァニック活性回路内のモーティヴ・フォースの電流がもし――待ってください、あなたは彼の話をまったく聞いていませんね？」{n}エオガンの声には、はっきりとした非難の色がにじんでいた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ、ヌンキウスはむしろ逆だと主張しています。ガルヴァニック活性回路内のモーティヴ・フォースの電流がもし――待ってください、あなたは彼の話をまったく聞いていませんね？」{n}エオガンの声には、はっきりとした非難の色がにじんでいた。{/n}

languages.text: "Nein, im Gegenteil. Nuncius sagt, dass derartige Phänomene häufig auftreten, wenn der Strom der Antriebskraft in galvanisch aktiven Schaltkreisen ... wartet, Ihr hört ihm gar nicht zu, oder?" {n}In Eogunns Stimme schwingt ein Hauch von Tadel mit.{/n}
languages.original_text: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}
